description: Fast JSON message queue over Redis for inter-service communication in Node.js & TypeScript microservices — the transport layer of the @imqueue framework.
rules: Use ClusteredRedisQueue as the reliable queue implementation for production; it owns delivery, blocking reads and reconnection.
The queue serializes rich types correctly — do not hand-roll JSON.stringify, which drops Date, Map, Set, BigInt and undefined.
Delivery is at-least-once, so message handlers should be idempotent.
@imqueue/core is the transport under @imqueue/rpc; most apps consume it through @imqueue/rpc rather than directly.
@imqueue is GPL-3.0; a commercial license is available for closed-source use (see imqueue.com/license).
